title: New 3D Torches
description: Makes "New Torches" by Waradu 3D! (In First Person)
body:
## ⚠️ Warning!
******Original [Resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-torches) by [Waradu](https://modrinth.com/user/Waradu)******

## ✅ This Resource Pack add:

- _**Torch 3D in first person**_
- _**Save 2D in HUD, if version is above 1.3**_

## 📖 Need to know:
**Dont need [OG](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-torches) resource pack**

******USE WITH [SHADERS](https://modrinth.com/shaders) FOR BEST GAMEPLAY******

**My First Resource pack by the way**

## 📢 Other

<details>
<summary>About Resource Pack</summary>

**1. How you made this resource pack?**

_When i start make this resource pack, i make it for myself. But when i done it, i start thinking about uploading this resource pack. And how you see i uploaded it_
</details>


<details>
<summary>QnA</summary>

****Will be a Backport?****

_**No, backport not planned, very small chance it will be**_
</details>

**_****Last Version: 1.4****_**
